metadata.description: Source-level architecture knowledge for Claude Code — 68 lessons covering hooks, permissions, agents, compaction, /dream, proactive away summary, CERT_STORE, dynamic loop pacing, and more, verified through the v2.1.101 binary.

plugins.name: claude-code-internals
plugins.description: Gives Claude source-level knowledge of its own architecture. 68 lessons covering every internal subsystem — hooks (all 27 event types), permissions (7-phase pipeline, 23 validators), boot sequence, agents, compaction, MCP, memory, AskUserQuestion, and binary-verified new features through v2.1.101 (proactive away summary, CLAUDE_CODE_CERT_STORE, dynamic loop pacing, cloud-first loops, /dream, Perforce mode, Script Caps). Searchable via RRF (keyword + TF-IDF fusion).
